# PERF-230 negative: pure helper hoisted before loop
lang: go
file: PERF-230-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

func parseProps(props string) int {
	return len(props)
}

func DrawCells(cells []string, props string) int {
	w := parseProps(props)
	total := 0
	for _, cell := range cells {
		total += w + len(cell)
	}
	return total
}
